settings.noModelsFromEndpoint: No models read from the endpoint. You can enter an ID manually below.
settings.whisperDownloadedHint: Click to set as default. Right-click to uninstall.
settings.whisperNotDownloadedHint: Click to download and set as default
flashcards.deckNameAutoDesc: With one APKG per episode, the deck name is generated from the media or subtitle file, cleaning up the extension, language suffix, and technical tags.
sync.transcodingHint: MKV/AVI audio is being extracted for playback. This is only needed the first time.
sync.autoSyncProgress.preparingSegments: Preparing and extracting {{total}} audio segments in parallel...
sync.autoSyncProgress.loadingModel: Audio preparation complete. Loading Whisper model...
sync.autoSyncProgress.noMatches: No confident matches found. Try a larger Whisper model or check that the SRT matches the audio.
sync.autoSyncProgress.done: Auto-sync complete! Created {{count}} new anchor points.
flashcards.filesHelp: Series mode: add one subtitle file per episode. Native subtitles and media are matched automatically by name.
flashcards.filesHelpMovie: Movie mode: add the target subtitles, and optionally the native subtitles and a media file.
settings.anki.exportFormatDesc: Default output format for generated flashcard decks.
settings.whisper.resetBaseNotDownloaded: The "Base" model is not downloaded. Set model "{{name}}" as default.
settings.whisper.resetBaseDownloadWarnin: The default "Base" model is not yet downloaded. Please download it to use.
settings.language.resetSuccess: Language preferences and smart matching rules reset to defaults
settings.anki.resetSuccess: Anki templates and fields reset to defaults
